# ChurnRecovery

> Affordable churn recovery platform for SaaS subscription businesses. $20/month after a 30-day free trial.

## What is ChurnRecovery?

ChurnRecovery helps subscription businesses reduce churn through cancel flow interception, smart retention offers (pause, discount, plan switch), failed payment recovery (dunning), and churn analytics. $20/month with a 30-day free trial — affordable for SaaS companies of all sizes.

## Key Features

- Cancel flow builder with smart save offers (pause, discount, plan switch, exit survey)
- Failed payment recovery and dunning automation (smart retries, email sequences)
- Churn analytics dashboard (cancel reasons, save rates, revenue recovered)
- Embeddable widget — one line of code to add cancel flows to any site
- Integrations: Stripe, Chargebee, Paddle, Lemon Squeezy, and more

## Use Cases

- SaaS subscription retention
- Membership site churn prevention
- Newsletter subscriber recovery (Substack, Ghost, Beehiiv)
- Online course platform retention (Kajabi, Teachable)
- E-commerce subscription management

## Key Stats

- Cancel flows save 20-35% of cancellation attempts
- Pause offers convert 15-25% of "not using it" cancellations
- Smart payment retries recover 30-50% of failed payments
- Median SaaS churn rate is 5-7% annually
